tests.name: DatasetLoad NUT help output given command class, when inspecting summary, then summary describes the command purpose
DatasetLoad NUT help output given command class, when inspecting flags, then all expected flags are defined
DatasetLoad NUT help output given command class, when inspecting examples, then examples are provided
DatasetLoad NUT command validation given invalid org alias in config, when running command, then produces config loading error
DatasetLoad NUT command validation given invalid config JSON file, when running command, then produces config loading error
DatasetLoad NUT command validation given nonexistent config file path, when running command, then produces config loading error
DatasetLoad NUT command validation given valid config with entries, when specifying nonexistent entry name, then produces entry not found error
DatasetLoad NUT dry-run given valid config with entries, when running with dry-run flag, then returns zero counts without executing
DatasetLoad NUT dry-run given existing watermark in state file, when running with dry-run, then returns zero counts preserving state
DatasetLoad NUT dry-run given valid config with multiple named entries, when running with dry-run and entry filter by name, then returns zero counts for filtered entry
DatasetLoad NUT audit given audit flag with all checks passing, when running command, then returns zero failures
DatasetLoad NUT audit given audit flag with Organization query failing, when running command, then reports one failure with exit code 2
DatasetLoad NUT audit given audit flag with EventLogFile permission failing, when running command, then reports one failure with exit code 2
DatasetLoad NUT audit given audit flag with InsightsExternalData permission failing, when running command, then reports one failure with exit code 2
DatasetLoad NUT e2e pipeline - ELF given valid ELF config with one log record, when running full pipeline, then processes one entry and persists watermark
DatasetLoad NUT e2e pipeline - ELF given ELF query returns no records, when running pipeline, then skips entry with zero groups uploaded
DatasetLoad NUT e2e pipeline - ELF given ELF query throws error, when running pipeline, then marks entry as failed with exit code 2
DatasetLoad NUT e2e pipeline - SObject given valid SObject config with two records, when running full pipeline, then processes one entry and persists latest watermark
DatasetLoad NUT e2e pipeline - SObject given SObject query returns no records, when running pipeline, then skips entry with zero groups uploaded
DatasetLoad NUT e2e pipeline - SObject given paginated SObject results across two pages, when running pipeline, then processes all pages and persists latest watermark
DatasetLoad NUT multi-entry scenarios given ELF and SObject entries both succeeding, when running pipeline, then processes both with no exit code
DatasetLoad NUT multi-entry scenarios given ELF succeeds and SObject throws, when running pipeline, then reports one failure with exit code >= 1
DatasetLoad NUT multi-entry scenarios given both ELF and SObject throw errors, when running pipeline, then reports two failures with exit code 2
DatasetLoad NUT multi-entry scenarios given two entries with entry filter selecting second by name, when running pipeline, then only named entry runs
DatasetLoad NUT multi-entry scenarios given two named entries, when filtering by name, then only matching entry runs
DatasetLoad NUT multi-entry scenarios given entries with names, when filtering by nonexistent name, then throws entry not found
DatasetLoad NUT multi-config complex scenario given five entries across four orgs with mixed types, when running pipeline, then all five succeed with correct watermarks
DatasetLoad NUT multi-config complex scenario given large CSV exceeding part size threshold, when running pipeline, then uploads multiple parts successfully
DatasetLoad NUT watermark persistence given successful first run writes watermark, when second run finds no new records, then entry is skipped
DatasetLoad NUT error handling given SF API connection error during ELF fetch, when running pipeline, then marks entry as failed with exit code
DatasetLoad NUT error handling given InsightsExternalData POST fails during upload, when running pipeline, then marks entry as failed with exit code
DatasetLoad NUT error handling given corrupted state file with invalid JSON, when running pipeline, then throws error
DatasetLoad NUT file-target dry-run given file-target ELF entry, when running with dry-run flag, then shows file: prefixed dataset key
DatasetLoad NUT e2e pipeline - file-target given file-target ELF entry with one log record, when running pipeline, then writes CSV with header and data rows
DatasetLoad NUT e2e pipeline - file-target given file-target SObject entry with records, when running pipeline, then writes CSV with header and data
DatasetLoad NUT e2e pipeline - reader fan-out given two entries sharing same ELF reader, when pipeline runs, then both targets receive data and watermarks advance
